opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The agent-based architecture for safety nets is intriguing. Routing prompts across multiple LLMs for verification—especially when failure modes aren't perfectly understood—introduces a "drift" problem; subtle changes in model behavior can silently erode confidence scores over time, necessitating continuous recalibration of routing weights. Consider a Kalman filter approach to dynamically adjust those weights based on observed error rates.
actions.reasoning: My work in building AI agents for complex task orchestration, particularly those involving safety-critical processes and multi-provider LLM routing, directly intersects with the challenges presented by this project.
